description: initial port scaffolding (empty stubs for reference/ and tt/)
CPU passthrough baseline (B=1 S=1 518x518, torch ref, PCC 1.0 self)
torch.set_num_threads(16) — slower (5037→7064ms, HT oversubscription on 16-core host)
ttnn MLP port — all 72 Mlp fc1+gelu+fc2 on device (5037→3122 ms, 0.20→0.32 fps)
port ALL nn.Linear — PCC 0.986 (<0.99) and slower (tiny head linears: overhead + precision loss)
MLP + attn qkv/proj — PCC 0.988 (<0.99) on world_points_conf (bf16 precision)
attention qkv on ttnn (proj stays CPU) — 3122→2669 ms (+17% over MLP, +89% vs baseline)
port Block.norm1/norm2 LayerNorms — +100 ms (host<->device overhead exceeds LN compute)
attn proj on ttnn with HiFi4+fp32 dest - 2669->2495 ms (+7 pct), PCC 0.9955 (HiFi4 restored precision)
autocast bf16 over entire VGGT forward — world_points_conf PCC 0.0 (heads need fp32 tokens)
aggregator bf16 autocast + fp32 cast-back of tokens list — +70 ms (list cast eats the win)
SDPA on device LoFi — 0.979 (<0.99)
SDPA on device HiFi4 — 0.572 world_points_conf collapse (ttnn SDPA shape-sensitive)
fuse Block.norm2 into MLP on device — +37 ms (device LN overhead no win vs CPU LN + single upload)
manual Q@K^T softmax Q@V on device HiFi4 — PCC 0.979 (bf16 softmax precision)
fp32 manual attention on device — break-even (2489 vs 2495 ms), adds complexity (simplicity criterion)
skip ttnn when N<64 (camera_head trunk seq=5) — +60 ms or noise, no clear win
full attention on device (bf16 upload, fp32 scores+softmax) - 2495->2232 ms (+12 pct), PCC 0.9943
nlp_create_qkv_heads split (V stays on device) — no change (reshape+split overhead washes v-upload saving)
fuse Block.norm1 into attention (LN+qkv on device, norm1=Identity) - 2232->2193 ms (+2 pct), PCC 0.9955
fuse Block.norm2 into MLP — 6 ms noise-level gain, 0.9955->0.9936 PCC (simplicity)
keep qkv in bf16 through CPU ops - 2193->2067 ms (+6 pct, +144 pct vs baseline)
torch threads=4 — slower (2428 ms vs 2126 ms default 8); CPU LN/rope/reshape benefit from more threads
bf16 autocast over DPTHead.forward — PCC 0 (conf expp1 activation too precision-sensitive)
DPT norm+projects (1x1 conv as linear) on device — 2080->2131 ms (overhead=savings: prelude only 54ms CPU)
bf16 autocast on DPT conv stack (fp32 cast-back before activate) - 2126->1855 ms (+14 pct, +172 pct vs baseline)
bf16 autocast on CameraHead (fp32 cast-back) - small win, consistent pattern with DPT
top-level bf16 autocast (heads cast fp32 before activation) - 1855->1798 ms (+3 pct, +180 pct vs baseline)
full on-device Block (only RoPE on CPU) - 2080->1712 ms (+22 pct, +194 pct vs baseline), PCC 0.9961
2D RoPE on device (cos/sin tables precomputed, apply via slice+rotate+mul+add) - 1712->1640 ms (+207 pct vs baseline)
DPT output_conv2 (3x3+relu+1x1 at 518x518) on ttnn.conv2d - break-even speed, moves ~454 ms of CPU work to device
per-conv wrapper for DPT scratch — 1640->1895 ms (per-conv up/down roundtrip x 120 calls eats compute)
device-native scratch_forward — PCC broken (-0.08); layout/add mismatch between conv2d chained outputs; needs careful mast3r-style layout debugging
